news.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply chain risk
news.summary: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of War to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

news.title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so creators can ditch the hashtags
news.summary: The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.

news.title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
news.summary: A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.

news.title: Supreme Court won’t hear AI-generated art copyright case
news.summary: The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. news.title: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
news.summary: Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances.
